description: The Aryan Brotherhood is a white supremacist prison gang and organized crime syndicate in the United States, founded in 1964 at San Quentin State Prison. With an estimated 20,000 members inside and outside prison, it is responsible for up to 25% of murders in the federal prison system despite comprising less than 3% of the inmate population. The gang engages in drug trafficking, extortion, inmate prostitution, and contract killings, and is known for its hierarchical leadership structure and distinctive tattoos.
